summary: Smoke tested backend and frontend of Facilissimo Web. Health, contact create, contact list, hero, all 5 nav tabs, and contact form submission (incl. registro real-time) all PASS. Chat endpoint FAILS with HTTP 500 due to Emergent LLM Key budget exhausted (Max budget: 0.0). Frontend chat UI stays stuck on 'Teresa AI sta scrivendo' with no response.
passed: GET /api/contact/submissions -> 200 list contains new + prior submissions
Hero loads with heading 'Siti web che vivono nel futuro costruiti con l'Intelligenza Artificiale.'
Navigation testids nav-home / nav-chi-sono / nav-proposte / nav-contatti / nav-chat all switch views

Contact form (input-name/email/company, project-type-select, budget-select, message-textarea, submit-contact-btn) submits successfully; contact-success visible; submission appears in Registro Real-Time

failed.issue: POST /api/chat returns HTTP 500. Emergent LLM Key rejected by LiteLLM: 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0'. Claude Sonnet 4.6 call fails for every request.
failed.evidence: curl POST /api/chat with italian question about AI Professional timeline -> {"detail":"Errore AI: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0"} HTTP:500

failed.issue: Chat UI on /chat sends the message but never receives an AI reply; remains on 'Teresa AI sta scrivendo' indefinitely. No user-facing error surfaced from the 500 response.
failed.evidence: chat-messages inner text after send + 6s wait: welcome bubble + user message + 'Teresa AI sta scrivendo' (no assistant response). Root cause is backend 500 above.

action_items: Refresh / top-up the EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget (currently Max budget: 0.0) in /app/backend/.env, or request a new key with budget allocation, then re-test POST /api/chat.
Improve ChatView error handling: surface a visible error toast/message when /api/chat returns non-2xx instead of leaving the typing indicator forever.
test_credentials: N/A - app has no auth flow
